Last month, we set out a goal to raise $1.7 million in just ten days because that's how much we needed to continue building the organization necessary to have a legitimate long-term path forward. This was a real, unvarnished look under the hood of our operation at a level of transparency unprecedented in modern presidential campaigns.
When we set this goal I wasn't sure what to expect. But this grassroots team came together and blew past it, raising over $2.1 million before the FEC deadline. It was the best fundraising stretch of our campaign.
**This is my sincere promise to you: I will always be radically transparent about how we see the race and what our campaign needs to succeed. Radical transparency was not a fundraising gimmick, and it by no means stops now that we 've entered the fourth quarter. [If you agree that it's time for a leader who is open and honest with the public, chip in to support our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191006_CB_20191006-fr-CB-transparency-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
This is what you can count on from our campaign. We've set a new standard for openness with our friends and supporters when it comes to our fundraising goals, and we're going to continue this transparency. We believe our supporters deserve to know how their money is being spent and what the financial outlook of our campaign looks like.
Together,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191006_CB_20191006-fr-CB-transparency-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a60/5fca0d19/77154df2/291f5d0c/1408655241/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

Peter, Today I’m outside of the Texas 10th, but inside the struggle for a better Texas. We are walking the picket line with the United Auto Workers, Local 276, here in Arlington, where nearly 5,000 workers are on strike against General Motors.
Our UAW brothers and sisters are on strike for basic dignity. These are workers who helped General Motors get out of bankruptcy in 2007 by accepting temporary concessions – which GM promised would soon end. But since 2016, GM has taken over $35 billion in North American profits, and has paid billions to shareholders and executives, but it has failed to make its workers whole, as promised. The importance of the UAW strike to Texas cannot be overstated. In a “right to work” region, GM Arlington is a rare unionized auto plant. Arlington workers are striking with 50,000 GM workers nationwide, and they are doing it in a most unforgiving environment. They deserve our unwavering support. I’m running for Congress because I believe that unions are essential to the movement for progressive change. If you’d like to join us in supporting UAW workers in Arlington, [please send us a note](mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org?subject=UAW%20Strike). And if you are not here in Texas, please work through your local labor organizations and show solidarity with UAW locals across the country. With you in the struggle,
Mike Siegel

| | |
# **Democrats are Wrong. Middle-Class Incomes Surging – Thanks to Trump Policies**

“Middle-class incomes, after adjusting for inflation, have surged by $5,003 since Donald Trump became president in January 2017,” Stephen Moore writes for Fox News.

“These numbers contrast sharply with the 16 years prior to Trump’s presidency. In the eight years that George W. Bush was president, median income barely showed any gain, up just $401 thanks to the deep recession of 2008. In the seven and a half years that Barack Obama was president, and not including the end of the recession, which Obama inherited, incomes inched up by $1,043 (June 2009 – January 2019).”
Of course, these income surges under President Trump, “especially in the last several months, have occurred at exactly the time when many liberal economists and media talking heads were shouting ‘recession.’”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6d44f1215&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:** [America’s unemployment rate drops to 50-year low!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76b020589f&e=3ee4985eea)

There could not be a matter of more pressing public concern . . . The impeachment proceedings should be opened up — now.”

body:
SCOTUS kicks off their next term today and we're ready to protect women's rights.
|
---

| | Friends, One year ago, the Supreme Court swore in Brett Kavanaugh, tipping the balance of the court. Today, the Supreme Court starts their new term. And with Kavanaugh on the court, reproductive rights are on the line. Late last week, it was announced that the Supreme Court would take up a Louisiana abortion bill that would regulate abortion access so that just one clinic and one doctor are able to perform abortion. In the entire state. **Here 's the thing, friends. Women's rights are human rights and human rights are women's rights. **_It 's that simple._ We deserve champions of reproductive rights to represent us -- in every branch of government. And Stephanie Schmid is that champion for New Jersey's 4th District. [**Can you chip in now to send Stephanie to Congress to fight for reproductive rights?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b6/522d4087/7afdf3b7/4f343337/1548629642/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[CHIP IN: $10](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b6/522d4087/7afdf3b7/4f343336/1548629642/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_10")**

body:

| | Hi there,

When I first made the pledge to take **no corporate PAC money for this campaign** , some pundits in Washington shook their heads and said we couldn't win statewide without big money.

**But they don 't know New Mexico like we do.**

Today, I'm excited to announce that our campaign raised more than $1 million last quarter -- _**a record setting amount at this point in the race.**_

We reached that number with thousands of small-dollar contributions from our grassroots army, and not a _dime_ from corporate PACs. I'm proud of how much we raised -- but I'm even more proud of how we did it. **Take a look: ** | | | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b47c/18e32a7f/53477fec/7b1a1905/1898430900/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peopleforben?refcode=dd_20191007_em_eoq_full")

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b47c/18e32a7f/53477fec/7b1a1905/1898430900/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peopleforben?refcode=dd_20191007_em_eoq_full")
---
This campaign has people power because New Mexican families share our vision for a better future -- with quality health care, strong schools and communities, common-sense gun safety laws, and public lands that will be protected for generations to come.

I'm humbled by the outpouring of support and grateful for the opportunity to meet so many voters since this campaign began. Every goal we reach is possible because of our grassroots supporters -- and when we win next November, it will be thanks to people like you.

All my best,

Ben Ray

body:
**DEMO MEMO:** Last week, GOP Secretary of State Mac Warner sent a note to Legislators telling them that Automatic Voter Registration (AVR), a bill that passed 3 years ago, would likely not be implemented for 5 years.
Now, under Republican leadership, voters are facing more obstacles in recent years. Mac Warner is standing in the way of West Virginia voters who want to make their way to the ballot box to exercise their right to vote.
* West Virginia was one of the FIRST states to pass AVR, yet Mac Warner has stalled it for 3 years while **19 other states have now passed AND implemented the bill.**
* Since Mac Warner took office, he's cost taxpayers of West Virginia**$3 million**[playing partisan politics](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10645122/107317546/1191366004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjU1NWEzYS00MWU5LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwVuKYSxn8YjaCzYCdCyUJSnhQ2tBQ3lpY3cqa0jC7o=&emci=c961b043-3be9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=cb555a3a-41e9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=5094937) after wrongfully teriminating employees.
* **Mac Warner has NO intention of implementing Automatic Voter Registration. **

subject: The U.S. is failing its young children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Hello Peter, Supporting public education is critical to supporting the growth of our children \-- early education has been shown to have a cascade effect of better performance in school and career outcomes. Despite this, one in three U.S. children still enter kindergarten without any formal preschooling. And only 29 percent of four-year-olds are enrolled in state-funded preschooling, intensifying the economic burdens that exist today for parents who want a good education for their child. ### Governor Weld has been busy campaigning this week! If you missed all the coverage, or want to know where Bill will be next, read on!
| | [SUPPORT BILL →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGL80MGSHovjO8U3D_u4-2zA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191007_newsletter_30o&n=2)

## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### CNN: _2020 GOP Candidate Supports Impeaching Trump_
"Former Massachusetts governor Bill Weld, who will challenge Donald Trump for the Republican nomination in 2020, says he supports impeaching President Trump"

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHk1KOxbf7BAxkl_YXQz_uryWfKTMUhTvhwPkWhsewXa2xL6T_L6ei1t0OvcPI7l4FGjA2OpHffWBF9DUrx2zjQXBanyPmyT_vBsuSwIdG4l3h03Blo205sVajH04VgcR6Q&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191007_newsletter_30o&n=3)
### Washington Examiner: _Bill Weld argues he can beat Trump_
"Bill Weld, one of three Republicans hoping to topple President Trump as their party's 2020 standard-bearer, insists he can be the White House incumbent...."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_CG3wJbQir4aa4SlMdbQUN1_XsZVE3BwV7cp83ZH9r6fllDjJmZjmwuMGWaryXsG4ygI6_EVQZK1knj9CeRLUFr4XmGaqiyahuj6m7mwdhsVCUy8u5IN5XehpJXpEUW318bYjj61DvG1GchE8Wshpag&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191007_newsletter_30o&n=4)
### The Hill: _**"Trump Challenger Bill Weld 'My Goal is to Win'"**_
"Former Massachusetts Gov. Bill Weld (R) said Friday that he intends to beat President Trump in the Republican primary, touting himself as a viable alternative..."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv3P9C9BnmyCxuUbMAixK5l8c-SrU-3cSUwL8IKCpM2Te9W9-RqkFihpUhJvTbLf4HUTUnQ7b6ApsegoNGwLGj2dTw8MjXLpkWIzHxF8d5BkU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191007_newsletter_30o&n=5)
### Council on Foreign Relations: _Bill Weld Answers our Foreign Policy Questions_
"CFR invited the presidential candidates challenging President Trump in the 2020 election to articulate their positions on twelve critical foreign policy issues"

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=omAO4PhNPOfhCtXsiaKeGw0raSd_S6j-dTxMXOudxW5Zjr3qVwItg6UdfnECEIx8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191007_newsletter_30o&n=6)
### WNPR: _Trump Challenger Bill Weld: "'I'm a New England Republican' and Voters Know What That Means"_
"Weld is fiscally conservative and socially liberal. He ran for Vice President as a Libertarian in 2016, and he says that's the sort of thing that plays well..."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=PuQQf1d8JWSl7izHX47HvIJwDpsBnI53K_MRoj9EmdO6nhtkQ0XdOZW6vaoSUAiuCjOm_aZCZeGw74mMfa3q7e_q5XxjadQmaLdL92pztddY7MPIMBH72LV6zvt29AkzsrIaPT5igsLDxgMVSsgHFQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191007_newsletter_30o&n=7)

body:
Thank you for the tremendous outpouring of support from every corner of Kentucky.
|
---

| | Peter, **thank you**. I cannot say that enough.

**Thank you** for the tremendous outpouring of support from every corner of Kentucky.

And **thank you** for helping us hit our reporting goal! Because of supporters like you, who stepped up when we needed you, we're heading into the final few weeks with the wind at our backs.

We'll be ready to fight, every day, for the issues that truly matter to Kentuckians:
* Strengthening public education
* Fighting the opioid epidemic
* Protecting pensions
* Expanding access to health care
* Creating good jobs in every corner of Kentucky
* Restoring transparency and accountability to Frankfort

[**Thank you for being a vital part of this campaign. Take the next step now and chip in today.**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a1d/ad6dc73/1478a705/db7df97/3133303332/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzMyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-eomty?refcode=20191007.1nd__333__&amount=5") With people like you standing with me, I know we can win in November, and I know we can build a better Kentucky for everyone.

name: Team Warner
subject: The single most important question to this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We want to know the best ways to spread Mark's message to Virginians, what issues you and your family care about the most, and anything else you think Mark should know!
|
---
| | Derek, want to know what question we ask ourselves every single day?

**How do we keep Virginia blue in 2020?**

It's the _most important_ question to this campaign, and we **must** answer it if we want to send Mark back to the Senate so he can continue fighting for Virginians.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: QUICK POLL: Trump abandons another ally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump just announced that he was withdrawing U.S. forces from northeast Syria where they have been working with our Kurdish allies to fight ISIS, putting them at risk of an impending Turkish offensive against them. This move is certain to destabilize the region and undo the progress we've made. This abandonment of a critical ally in the fight against terrorism sends a chilling message to the rest of the world that the U.S. will only align with you when it serves our interests and abandon you when we grow tired. This is just another instance of how Trump's unpredictable and reckless approach to foreign politics and military matters harms this nation and its ability to conduct business in the future. name: Booker HQ
subject: Will you help my friend, Cory Booker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
My name is Khary Penebaker, and I'm here to talk about my friend Cory Booker. | | |
---
| | **_Please read this note from my friend Khary Penebaker, then consider[chipping in to help us hit our $3 million October fundraising goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191007_KP_20191007-fr-KP-Khary-actives_actives_header_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") \- Cory_**
---
Nice to meet you, friend.
My name is Khary Penebaker, and I'm here to talk about my friend Cory Booker. I'm a father, husband, former candidate for congress, and advocate for common-sense gun laws after seeing the devastation of gun violence firsthand.
The first time I met him, Cory campaigned for me in Wisconsin as I ran for Congress in 2016. Within seconds of him leading our canvass kick-off, it was clear he has the passion, drive, and strength that one hopes to find in a leader.
Cory spoke about the need to come together under a collective voice against the hate that Donald Trump had brought to the forefront of his campaign. Cory explained that Washington can only work when we have leaders ready to put the people they serve first, and how down-ballot races were just as important as those at the top.
**We need a leader like Cory in the White House.[Will you chip in to help his campaign have the resources it needs to win?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191007_KP_20191007-fr-KP-Khary-actives_actives_l1_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
When he's in the White House, we know that Cory will fight for those who are too often forgotten -- because that's what he's been doing his entire career. He'll be a president for the people and here's why I know that.
This past April, Cory was back in Milwaukee for a gun violence prevention forum. I told the story about my mother and her struggle with depression that ultimately led her to take her own life. I spoke to the lifetime of memories clouded with pain rather than a lifetime of memories of us together.
Cory heard the hurt in my voice as I began to get choked up and told me that I'm one of the bravest people that he knows but if I was really courageous, I would shave my head because I was thinning on top. I chuckled.
And he said it at the moment I needed to hear it. But that night I definitely shaved my head -- I took it as a challenge. It's that kind of humanity that he's got. To me, he's not a politician. Cory is just a regular guy who happens to be brilliant. A good human being.
It's why I'm writing to you today. We need Cory as our president because he truly cares about the people he hopes to lead. He's a proven advocate for gun safety and leader on mental health issues -- and that's what we deserve in Washington. He understands the issues that affect Americans like you and me, and we'll be better off with Cory in the Oval Office -- creating a fairer, more just America for all.
This is a call to action. Cory's campaign needs to raise $3 million this month to fully fund their October growth budget and move up in the race. We know Cory is an underdog, but this campaign will not be outworked. Answer our call to action by donating here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191007_KP_20191007-fr-KP-Khary-actives_actives_l2_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Thank you,
Khary
Khary Penebaker
Gun Violence Survivor
DNC Black Caucus Treasurer
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191007_KP_20191007-fr-KP-Khary-actives_actives_contribbutton_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_PS: Here's Cory and me, pre-haircut, canvassing back in 2016._
_And here's Cory and me, post-haircut, in Milwaukee a few months ago._
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a6f/5fca0d19/771faa0a/291f57ae/825580645/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a6f/5fca0d19/771faa0a/291f57ad/825580645/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a6f/5fca0d19/771faa0a/291f57ac/825580645/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a6f/5fca0d19/771faa0a/291f57ab/825580645/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a6f/5fca0d19/771faa0a/291f57aa/825580645/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a6f/5fca0d19/771faa0a/291f57ae/825580645/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
